labels.analysis: The MCP Server "io.github.BalajSaleem/criterion" provides 3 tools focused on web search & research tasks. Core capabilities include search and retrieval. Key tools: search_quran, search_hadith, get_verse.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Web Search & Research" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: search.

tools.name: search_quran
tools.description: Search 6,236 Quran verses using semantic similarity. Returns verses with ±2 surrounding verses for context. Use this for questions about Quranic guidance, themes, or specific topics.

query.description: Search query for Quran verses (e.g., "patience in hardship")

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-20, default: 7)

tools.name: search_hadith
tools.description: Search 21,641 authentic Hadith narrations from 6 major collections: Sahih Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, Jami` at-Tirmidhi, Sunan Abi Dawud, 40 Hadith Nawawi, and Riyad as-Salihin. Filter by collection and authenticity grade. Use this for questions about Prophet Muhammad's teachings and practices.

query.description: Search query for Hadith (e.g., "charity and good deeds")

collections.description: Comma-separated collection names: bukhari, muslim, tirmidhi, abudawud, nawawi40, riyadussalihin (leave empty for all)

grade.description: Authenticity filter: sahih-only (most authentic), sahih-and-hasan (authentic + good), or all

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-15, default: 5)

tools.name: get_verse
tools.description: Retrieve a specific Quran verse by reference. Use this when you need an exact verse (e.g., Ayat al-Kursi is 2:255).
